notes: First AT&T commercial dial deployment: Chesapeake & Potomac Tel Co, Norfolk VA, November 1919 — 30 yr after Strowger patent (March 1889).
End of Great Depression plateau begins.
Cited verbatim — 'reaching 32% by 1930 and 60% by 1940'. ~53% of US population in a city with ≥1 cutover by 1940.
WPB copper restrictions halt new installations until 1945 (wartime plateau).
Still ~2% manual — rural and small markets.
Pacific Bell Santa Catalina Island (pop ~2000) cutover June 4, 1978 — final manual-exchange elimination. Total: 89 yr from Strowger patent to full mechanization.
